caption: A news broadcast shows a group of men and one woman seated behind a long white table against a red backdrop. The men are dressed in a mix of formal suits and traditional Indian attire, including kurtas and turbans. They sit side-by-side, facing forward, with water bottles and small floral arrangements on the table. On-screen text overlays identify several individuals, including "विजय सिन्हा" (Vijay Sinha), "सब्रत चौधरी" (Sabrat Chaudhary), and "संतोष सुमन" (Santosh Suman). A news ticker at the bottom and a headline bar at the top feature Hindi text, including the phrases "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and "JDU कोटे से श्रवण कुमार मंत्री बने". The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo appears in the upper right corner. As the scene progresses, the graphics shift, and a small inset window appears in the bottom right showing a man, while a new inset in the middle left shows a close-up of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" (Chief Minister Nitish Kumar).
